query:
SELECT id, firstName, lastName, phone, phone2, lastVisitDate, totalVisits, segment 
FROM customers 
WHERE LENGTH(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(phone, '(', ''), ')', ''), '-', ''), ' ', '')) < 10
LIMIT 5;
